title: All Other Miscellaneous Ambulatory Health Care Services

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 621999 ($8,200,942,012) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 621999 ($23,397,720,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $221,557 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 621999); class <5: 4,807 firms, avg revenue/firm $432,261 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $68,297 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 1,497 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,161,199 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $183,469 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 935 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,971,984 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $311,573 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 502 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,506,795 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $870,074 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 163 firms, avg revenue/firm $21,066,049 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,328,436 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 154 firms, avg revenue/firm $74,932,097 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $11,839,271 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 163
n_band.margin_source: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)
